allow: Bash(node -e "const t=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/data/template-definitions.json','utf8'\)\);const m={};for\(const x of t\){\(m[x.series_slug]=m[x.series_slug]||[]\).push\(x.slug+' ['+x.format+']'\)}for\(const k of Object.keys\(m\).sort\(\)\)console.log\(k,'=>',m[k].join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{depth=0;buf="";started=0} /^      \\{$/{started=1;buf="";depth=1;startln=NR;next} started{buf=buf"\\n"$0; if\($0~/\\{/&&$0!~/^      \\{$/\)depth++; if\($0~/\\}/\)depth--; if\(depth==0&&started\){if\(buf!~/templateSlug/\){print "LINE "startln":"buf;print "---"}; started=0}}' src/app/gallery/page.tsx)

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{depth=0;buf="";started=0} /^      \\{$/{started=1;buf="";depth=1;startln=NR;next} started{buf=buf"\\n"$0; if\($0~/\\{/&&$0!~/^      \\{$/\)depth++; if\($0~/\\}/\)depth--; if\(depth==0&&started\){if\(buf!~/templateSlug/\){match\(buf,/format: "\([a-z]+\)"/,fmt\);match\(buf,/filename: "\([^"]+\)"/,fn\);if\(fmt[1]!="reel"\)print startln"\\t"fmt[1]"\\t"fn[1]}; started=0}}' src/app/gallery/page.tsx)

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{depth=0;buf="";started=0} /^      \\{$/{started=1;buf="";depth=1;startln=NR;next} started{buf=buf"\\n"$0; if\($0~/\\{/&&$0!~/^      \\{$/\)depth++; if\($0~/\\}/\)depth--; if\(depth==0&&started\){if\(buf!~/templateSlug/\){match\(buf,/format: "\([a-z]+\)"/,fmt\);match\(buf,/filename: "\([^"]+\)"/,fn\);if\(fmt[1]=="post"&&fn[1]!~/reel/\)print startln"\\t"fn[1]}; started=0}}' src/app/gallery/page.tsx)

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{depth=0;buf="";started=0} /^      \\{$/{started=1;buf="";depth=1;startln=NR;next} started{buf=buf"\\n"$0; if\($0~/\\{/&&$0!~/^      \\{$/\)depth++; if\($0~/\\}/\)depth--; if\(depth==0&&started\){if\(buf!~/templateSlug/\){match\(buf,/format: "\([a-z]+\)"/,fmt\);match\(buf,/filename: "\([^"]+\)"/,fn\);if\(fmt[1]=="post"&&fn[1]!~/reel/\)print "MISSING: "fn[1]}; started=0}}' src/app/gallery/page.tsx)
